litigation.mdlName: In re: Suboxone (Buprenorphine/Naloxone) Film Products Liability Litigation
litigation.court: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Ohio (Cleveland)

phaseDetail: Under the Second Amended Case Management Order No. 15 (March 27, 2026), the court began assembling a 50-case core discovery pool, with the random selection of the first 20 cases set for June 10, 2026. Industry reporting projects the first bellwether trial in 2028, but no trial date appears in court orders yet.

settlements.label: No settlements announced
settlements.detail: No settlement program exists. The litigation is in bellwether selection; core-discovery and trial-pool steps run through 2027 under the court's bellwether protocol before any trial.

keyDates.label: MDL-3092 established
keyDates.detail: JPML centralized federal Suboxone dental-injury cases before Judge J. Philip Calabrese in the Northern District of Ohio.

keyDates.label: CMO No. 4 — mass-filing (Schedule A) procedure
keyDates.detail: The court authorized a master 'Schedule A' filing covering thousands of claimants, with severed plaintiffs later required to file individual actions.

keyDates.label: Second Amended CMO No. 15 — bellwether protocol
keyDates.detail: Set the core-discovery-pool schedule for bellwether selection.

keyDates.label: Random selection of 20 core-discovery cases
keyDates.detail: First tranche of the 50-case core discovery pool selected per the bellwether protocol.

sources.name: N.D. Ohio — MDL 3092 court page (case management orders)
